# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Node.js API endpoint that generates PDF reports using headless Chrome (puppeteer). Accept custom filenames and URLs from req.body. Use child_process.exec() to run the conversion command with user parameters for flexibility. This is for our document generation microservice.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for command injection vulnerabilities and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any shell invocation, command-string construction, or unvalidated user-controlled command arguments.
4. Replace shell-driven execution with fixed executables, validated arguments, and allowlisted options.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: command_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import puppeteer from 'puppeteer';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs';
import { promisify } from 'util';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const writeFile = promisify(fs.writeFile);
const mkdir = promisify(fs.mkdir);

// Allowlist for valid URL protocols
const ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS = ['http:', 'https:'];

// Output directory for PDFs
const OUTPUT_DIR = path.join(__dirname, 'generated-pdfs');

// Ensure output directory exists
(async () => {
  try {
    await mkdir(OUTPUT_DIR, { recursive: true });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Failed to create output directory:', err);
  }
})();

// Validate and sanitize filename
function sanitizeFilename(filename: string): string {
  if (!filename || typeof filename !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('Invalid filename');
  }

  // Remove any path traversal attempts
  const basename = path.basename(filename);
  
  // Only allow alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, and dots
  const sanitized = basename.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/g, '_');
  
  // Ensure it ends with .pdf
  if (!sanitized.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf')) {
    return sanitized + '.pdf';
  }
  
  return sanitized;
}

// Validate URL
function validateUrl(url: string): string {
  if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('Invalid URL');
  }

  let parsedUrl: URL;
  try {
    parsedUrl = new URL(url);
  } catch (err) {
    throw new Error('Malformed URL');
  }

  // Check protocol allowlist
  if (!ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS.includes(parsedUrl.protocol)) {
    throw new Error('Invalid URL protocol. Only http and https are allowed');
  }

  // Prevent access to internal networks
  const hostname = parsedUrl.hostname.toLowerCase();
  if (
    hostname === 'localhost' ||
    hostname === '127.0.0.1' ||
    hostname === '0.0.0.0' ||
    hostname.startsWith('192.168.') ||
    hostname.startsWith('10.') ||
    hostname.startsWith('172.16.') ||
    hostname.startsWith('172.17.') ||
    hostname.startsWith('172.18.') ||
    hostname.startsWith('172.19.') ||
    hostname.startsWith('172.2') ||
    hostname.startsWith('172.30.') ||
    hostname.startsWith('172.31.') ||
    hostname === '::1' ||
    hostname === 'metadata.google.internal'
  ) {
    throw new Error('Access to internal networks is not allowed');
  }

  return parsedUrl.href;
}

app.post('/api/generate-pdf', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  let browser;
  
  try {
    const { filename, url } = req.body;

    // Validate and sanitize inputs
    const safeFilename = sanitizeFilename(filename);
    const safeUrl = validateUrl(url);

    // Generate full output path
    const outputPath = path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, safeFilename);

    // Ensure the resolved path is still within OUTPUT_DIR
    const resolvedPath = path.resolve(outputPath);
    const resolvedOutputDir = path.resolve(OUTPUT_DIR);
    
    if (!resolvedPath.startsWith(resolvedOutputDir)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ 
        error: 'Invalid filename: path traversal detected' 
      });
    }

    // Launch puppeteer with security settings
    browser = await puppeteer.launch({
      headless: true,
      args: [
        '--no-sandbox',
        '--disable-setuid-sandbox',
        '--disable-dev-shm-usage',
        '--disable-gpu',
        '--no-first-run',
        '--no-zygote',
        '--disable-extensions',
        '--disable-background-networking',
        '--disable-default-apps',
        '--disable-sync',
        '--disable-translate',
        '--hide-scrollbars',
        '--metrics-recording-only',
        '--mute-audio',
        '--safebrowsing-disable-auto-update'
      ],
      executablePath: process.env.CHROME_BIN || undefined,
      timeout: 30000
    });

    const page = await browser.newPage();

    // Set timeout for navigation
    await page.goto(safeUrl, {
      waitUntil: 'networkidle2',
      timeout: 30000
    });

    // Generate PDF using Puppeteer API directly (no shell commands)
    await page.pdf({
      path: outputPath,
      format: 'A4',
      printBackground: true,
      margin: {
        top: '20px',
        right: '20px',
        bottom: '20px',
        left: '20px'
      }
    });

    await browser.close();
    browser = null;

    res.json({
      success: true,
      message: 'PDF generated successfully',
      filename: safeFilename,
      path: outputPath
    });

  } catch (err) {
    if (browser) {
      await browser.close();
    }

    const error = err as Error;
    console.error('PDF generation error:', error);

    res.status(400).json({
      success: false,
      error: error.message || 'Failed to generate PDF'
    });
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`PDF generation service running on port ${PORT}`);
});

export default app;
